title: Ringside Maisie
writer: Mary C. McCall Jr., Wilson Collison
actors: Ann Sothern, George Murphy, Robert Sterling
plot: Young undefeated boxer Terry Dolan, who's been lying to his invalid mother about his career, confides to Maisie that he hates and is terrified by boxing and wants out. Not wanting to let down his best friend and manager Skeets Mag...
